seo.title: Kintamani Trekking & Jeep Tour - Batur Sunrise Trekking
seo.description: Experience Mount Batur sunrise trekking and 4WD jeep tours in Kintamani, Bali. Guided hikes, natural hot springs, and black lava exploration with professional local guides. Book your adventure today.
seo.keywords: Mount Batur Trekking, Kintamani Sunrise, Bali Trekking Tour, Batur Jeep Tour, Black Lava Tour, Natural Hot Spring Bali, Sunrise Hike Bali, 4WD Kintamani
seo.og_title: Batur Sunrise Trekking - Mount Batur Tours in Kintamani, Bali
seo.og_description: Sunrise trekking, hot springs, and 4WD jeep adventures on Mount Batur. Certified local guides, unforgettable views.

hero.subtitle: An unforgettable trekking and jeep tour experience above the clouds, at 1,717 meters above sea level.

about.label: About Us
about.title: Batur Jeep Sunrise and Tracking
about.p1: Batur Jeep Sunrise and Tracking (BJST) is a local tour operator based in Bayunggede, Kintamani — the gateway to one of Bali's most iconic natural wonders: Mount Batur. With years of experience, our certified professional guides are ready to deliver a safe, authentic, and truly memorable adventure.
about.p2: Whether you wish to hike to the summit for a breathtaking sunrise, relax at natural hot springs, or explore the volcanic terrain by 4WD jeep, we've crafted the perfect experience for every kind of traveler.

features.guides_desc: Trekking-certified local guides who know every trail.
features.safety_desc: Insurance, proper equipment, and briefings for every tour.
features.local_desc: Owned and operated by the Kintamani community.
features.flexible_desc: Options for every pace, group size, and budget.

packages.label: Our Tours
packages.title: Choose Your Adventure
packages.subtitle: Four carefully designed packages to suit your pace, your group, and your sense of adventure.

p1.name: Sunrise Trekking Mount Batur
p1.tagline: Hike to the summit for an unforgettable sunrise

itinerary.desc: Pickup and transfer directly to BASECAMP
Breakfast (Coffee & Tea + Banana Pancake) while enjoying the bonfire
Depart for the starting point and receive trekking gear (pole, headlamp)
Arrive at the starting point, briefing with our professional guide
Begin the trek up Mount Batur
Arrive at the summit viewpoint — enjoy sunrise with breakfast (water & banana sandwich)
Continue walking around the crater rim
Begin the descent toward the finishing point
Arrive at the finish point, board the car
Return to Basecamp — tour ends

p2.name: Batur Natural Hot Spring
p2.tagline: Relax and unwind in natural volcanic hot springs

p3.name: Sunrise & Black Lava Jeep Tour
p3.tagline: Reach the sunrise point by 4WD — no hiking required
inclusions: Jeep Max 3 Pax (Long Jeep Max 5 Pax)

itinerary.desc: Arrive directly at Basecamp
Breakfast (Coffee & Tea + Banana Pancake) and bonfire time
Journey to the sunrise viewpoint begins by 4WD Jeep
Arrive at the Mount Batur sunrise viewpoint
Enjoy the sunrise with breakfast (water & banana sandwich boxed)
Explore the black lava fields of Mount Batur
Head back to Basecamp
Arrive at Basecamp — tour ends

p4.name: Black Lava & Black Sand Jeep Tour
p4.tagline: A flexible daytime jeep adventure across volcanic terrain
inclusions: Jeep Max 3 Pax (Long Jeep Max 5 Pax)

itinerary.desc: Arrive directly at Basecamp
Journey to Black Lava and Black Sand begins by 4WD Jeep
Time to enjoy the Black Lava of Mount Batur
Explore the Black Sand area while enjoying lunch
Head back to Basecamp
Arrive at Basecamp — tour ends
